{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Green (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Green is a character addressed by [[Blue]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Hold off, Green. We’ll need to last longer."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
